title: SG12 0DP, Glaxo Operations UK Limited, permit surrender issued - EPR/CP3947QF/S003
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: Glaxo Operations UK Limited Installation name: David Jack Centre Permit number: EPR/CP3947QF/S003  "
